logs: Phase 1 (Extract): Retrieved Figma node 363:82 for About us page.
Phase 2 (Transform): Mapped layout to 7-layer architecture. Omitted raw imgraw elements.
Phase 3 (Construct): Built DOM using whtml_builder. Replaced all images with native Image elements linked to existing Asset IDs to comply with strict image rules.
Phase 4 (Validate): Page assembled with Navbar, sections, and Footer.
